Class CashInventory

java.lang.Object
CashInventory
public class CashInventory extends Object
Represents the cash reserves of the vending machine.

This class manages the available bill and coin denominations, determines whether enough change can be produced for a transaction, dispenses change, replenishes cash reserves, and allows collection of all money stored in the machine.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CashInventory()
    Constructs an empty cash inventory.

  • Constructor Details

    • CashInventory

      public CashInventory()
      Constructs an empty cash inventory.

      All denominations are initialized with zero reserves.

  • Method Details

    • getDenominations

      public int[] getDenominations()
      Returns the list of supported denominations.
      Returns:
      an array containing all supported denominations

    • getReserves

      public int[] getReserves()
      Returns the current cash reserves.
      Returns:
      an array containing the quantity of each denomination

    • enoughChange

      public boolean enoughChange(double change)
      Determines whether the vending machine has sufficient cash reserves to provide the specified amount of change.

      This method simulates dispensing change without modifying the actual cash reserves.

      Parameters:
      change - the amount of change to be produced
      Returns:
      true if the machine can produce the required change; false otherwise

    • dispenseChange

      public void dispenseChange(double change)
      Dispenses the specified amount of change using the available cash reserves.
      Parameters:
      change - the amount of change to dispense

    • setReserves

      public void setReserves(int newQuantity, int i)
      Updates the quantity available for a specific denomination.
      Parameters:
      newQuantity - the new quantity to be stored
      i - the index of the denomination

    • displayDenominations

      public void displayDenominations()
      Displays all supported denominations together with their available quantities.

    • extractCash

      public double extractCash()
      Collects all money currently stored in the vending machine.

      After the cash is collected, all cash reserves are reset to zero.

      Returns:
      the total amount of money collected
